# [Clang] Assertion `OldTInfo && "substituting function without type source info"` failed since clang 6.0

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/175428

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 6.0.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/fE9aaq6hG

## Program
```cpp
class InterfaceBase {
public:
  virtual ~InterfaceBase() = default;
};

template <typename T> class InterfaceWrapper : public InterfaceBase;

template <int> struct bad {
  template <class T, auto =
                         [] {
                           struct TestClass : InterfaceWrapper<TestClass> {};
                         }>
  static void f(T);
}

int main() {
  bad<0>::f(0);
}
```

```bash
Compiler returned: 134
```

## Comments

### Comment 1 - keinflue

Minor modification together with `-std=c++20` makes it `crash-on-valid`:
```cpp
class InterfaceBase {
public:
  virtual ~InterfaceBase() = default;
};

template <typename T> class InterfaceWrapper : public InterfaceBase {};

template <int> struct bad {
  template <class T, auto =
                         [] {
                           struct TestClass : InterfaceWrapper<TestClass> {};
                         }>
  static void f(T);
};

int main() {
  bad<0>::f(0);
}
```

---

### Comment 2 - llvmbot


@llvm/issue-subscribers-clang-frontend

Author: Jireh Guo (Xniao)

<details>
***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 6.0.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/fE9aaq6hG

## Program
```cpp
class InterfaceBase {
public:
  virtual ~InterfaceBase() = default;
};

template &lt;typename T&gt; class InterfaceWrapper : public InterfaceBase;

template &lt;int&gt; struct bad {
  template &lt;class T, auto =
                         [] {
                           struct TestClass : InterfaceWrapper&lt;TestClass&gt; {};
                         }&gt;
  static void f(T);
}

int main() {
  bad&lt;0&gt;::f(0);
}
```
